channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: President Biden welcomes 2024 NBA champion Boston Celtics to White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The White House was tinted green on Thursday, when President Joe Biden — Secret Service code name: Celtic — welcomed “Coach Joe” Mazzulla and the Boston Celtics to the South Lawn to celebrate the franchise’s unprecedented 18th NBA championship.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: St. Petersburg council rejects immediate repair to Rays' ballpark roof after first giving approval
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — The St. Petersburg City Council reversed course Thursday on whether to spend more than $23 million to repair the hurricane-shredded roof of the Tampa Bay Rays' ballpark, initially voting narrowly for approval and hours later changing course.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Narin An leads with a 64 in the wind as Nelly Korda struggles in LPGA finale
item.description: NAPLES, Fla. (AP) — Narin An handled the windy conditions with a hot putter on Thursday, making four straight birdies around the turn and finishing with an 8-under 64 for a one-shot lead in the CME Group Tour Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trans volleyball player legal hearing opened with long and heated debate over what pronouns to use
item.description: The first 45 minutes of a hearing over a trans athlete's eligibility to play women's volleyball were dedicated to a debate on pronouns and identity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Teresa Weatherspoon isn't dwelling on surprising firing by Chicago Sky
item.description: Teresa Weatherspoon is focused on her future and not dwelling on the past. It's been nearly two months since the Chicago Sky fired her as coach after just one season with the franchise. “I’m excited,” Weatherspoon said on a conference call for her new team in the Unrivaled 3-on-3 league.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls have no answers for Giannis, fall to Bucks, 122-106
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Bulls answered the bell Wednesday night after trailing the Milwaukee Bucks by 18 points in the first half. They just had no answer for Giannis Antetokounmpo.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Las Vegas Grand Prix in better shape after ironing out inaugural year kinks that nearly ruined race
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — There’s never been a faster, more jaw-dropping 180-degree turn than the one Max Verstappen took a year ago at the inaugural Las Vegas Grand Prix.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Legendary UConn coach Geno Auriemma sets NCAA all-time wins record
item.description: UConn's legendary women's basketball head coach, Geno Auriemma, is the winningest coach in NCAA history after beating Fairleigh Dickinson Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Teen Paves the Way for Female Hockey Players
item.description: Chloe Jezek, a 16-year-old high school hockey player in North County, is paving the way for other girls in the male-dominated sport.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC falls at home to Vegas, 4-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - William Karlsson scored the go-ahead goal with 1:18 remaining, and the Vegas Golden Knights rallied for a 4-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center on Friday. “We stuck with it and eventually we got rewarded,” Karlsson said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nuggets star Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone miss game against Pelicans for personal reasons
item.description: The Denver Nuggets were without star center Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone for their NBA Cup opener Friday night against the New Orleans Pelicans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: SJSU volleyball captain demands removal of transgender athlete
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- Some San Jose State University women's volleyball players are suing their head coach, their university, and the Division-1 Mountain West Conference for allowing a transgender player to be on the team.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Roy High to play for first state title since 1981
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Roy High football team will play for its first state championship in 43 years. Roy defeated defending 5A champion Timpview on Friday, 29-19 to advance to next week's title game at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Sky coach Teresa Weatherspoon hired for new Unrivaled 3-on-3 basketball league
item.description: The total salary pool for the 36 players is more than $8 million, with players receiving equity in the league.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Volleyball: Cathedral 3, Los Alamitos 0
item.description: The Lady Dons take on the Griffins of Los Alamitos in the first round of the 2024 CIF Open Division Championships.
item.dc:creator: Joaquin Duncan, Fox 5
